plugin.name: LuaAudio
plugin.author: Panagiotis Kalogiratos (Nodens)
plugin.description:
QMud native compatibility shim - Legacy XML ignored.
Loading this plugin activates QMud's native LuaAudio compatibility shim. The original LuaAudio Lua and audio.dll code are not loaded or executed; QMud provides the supported LuaAudio APIs natively.
